title: La deuda pública se modera al 101,6% del PIB en marzo, aunque su importe alcanza el récord de 1,740 billones
summary: La deuda de las administraciones públicas se situó en el mes de marzo en máximos de 1,740 billones de euros, tras elevarse un 4,3% en términos interanuales, aunque moderó su peso en el Producto Interior Bruto (PIB) al 101,6% respecto al mismo período del año anterior, 1,7 puntos porcentuales menos,

title: Europa pone límites a los proveedores chinos
summary: Los planes de la Comisión Europea para forzar a las industrias química y de maquinaria del continente para que diversifiquen sus proveedores presentan interrogantes. Leer

title: ERC blinda el calendario de la financiación a cambio de apoyar las primeras cuentas de Illa
summary: Socialistas y republicanos se comprometen a incorporar la gestión del IRPF por parte de la Hacienda catalana en la reforma legal de la nueva financiación autonómica que deberá tramitarse en las Cortes. Leer

title: Las amistades peligrosas que hacen difícil la recuperación del bipartidismo
summary: Las cesiones de Sánchez al nacionalismo y al radicalismo están hundiendo al PSOE. La mala experiencia de los socialistas es una lección para un Partido Popular que se dispone a pactar con Vox. Leer

title: El sueldo medio en el tercer sector subirá un 23% con la equiparación
summary: "Europa va hacia prestaciones sociales que lleguen también a clases medias y trabajadoras", expone la consellera de Afers Socials i Inclusió de la Generalitat, Mònica Martínez Bravo. Leer

title: Mango founder's son arrested in Spain over father's death
summary: Spanish police said Tuesday they have arrested the eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic over his father's death during a hiking trip in December 2024.

title: Spain's former PM under investigation for influence peddling
summary: Spain's former Socialist Prime Minister José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero has been placed under investigation for influence peddling and related crimes, a court said Tuesday.

title: IN PICTURES: Fiesta and fervour at Spain's El Rocío pilgrimage
summary: If there's a tradition that shows how partying and religious devotion are deep-seated in the culture of Spain's southern Andalusia region, that's the 1-million-people pilgrimage and festivities of El Rocío.

title: Three key takeaways from Andalusia's election results
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez's Socialist party suffered a beating in regional elections in Andalusia over the weekend, but it's still unclear who will govern. Here's what you need to know about the vote.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday
summary: Spain may stop celebrities from starring in gambling ads, American tourist arrested in Barcelona for assaulting three women, Vox hints it will influence who governs in Andalusia and more news on Tuesday May 19th.

title: 'Trend will continue': Number of people refused entry to Europe sees sharp rise
summary: The number of people refused entry to the EU and Schengen area has risen dramatically, according to new statistics, while thousands of US, UK and Indian nationals have been found to be illegally present in EU/Schengen countries.

title: What to expect from the second week of teacher strikes in Spain
summary: Teachers and other educators in Valencia, Catalonia and Aragón have been staging a series of walkouts in recent days, protesting everything from class sizes to salary and working conditions. Here's what you need to know about the situation this week.
